name: Oh-My-Pi
description: Oh-My-Pi (omp) is a terminal-based AI coding agent with hash-anchored edits, LSP integration, built-in tools, subagents, and support for 40+ model providers. A batteries-included fork of Pi by Mario Zechner.

notes.text: Run 'omp' in your terminal to start. First run will launch the setup wizard to configure your model provider.
Oh-My-Pi requires an API key for at least one supported model provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.).
